name: example-private-agent-pack
description: Private aidevops agent pack for a specific domain or client workflow.

primary_agents.name: ExampleOps
primary_agents.purpose: Primary entrypoint for private example operations.

subagents.name: example-ops.research
subagents.purpose: Research support for the example operations workflow.

commands.name: example-status
commands.purpose: Report the current private workflow status.

helpers.name: example-helper
helpers.purpose: Deterministic helper for private workflow automation.

required_secrets.name: EXAMPLE_API_KEY
required_secrets.purpose: Authenticate to the private example API.

outputs.name: status-report
outputs.purpose: Generated status reports and workflow artifacts.
